description: TrimOS Service Intelligence Database — classifies Windows services by safety level

services.name: AJRouter
services.description: Routes AllJoyn messages for IoT devices. Not needed for most users.

services.name: ALG
services.description: Provides support for 3rd party protocol plugins for Internet Connection Sharing.

services.name: AppIDSvc
services.description: Determines and verifies the identity of an application. Used by AppLocker.

services.name: Appinfo
services.description: Facilitates running apps with admin privileges (UAC). Essential.

services.name: AudioEndpointBuilder
services.description: Manages audio devices. Required for sound.

services.name: Audiosrv
services.description: Manages audio for Windows programs. Required for sound.

services.name: BDESVC
services.description: Provides BitLocker encryption. Keep if using disk encryption.

services.name: BFE
services.description: Manages firewall and IPsec policies. Required for Windows Firewall.

services.name: BITS
services.description: Transfers files in the background. Used by Windows Update.

services.name: BrokerInfrastructure
services.description: Controls which background tasks can run. Essential for Windows.

services.name: BTAGService
services.description: Bluetooth audio gateway. Only needed with Bluetooth audio devices.

services.name: BthAvctpSvc
services.description: Audio/Video Control Transport Protocol. Only needed for Bluetooth.

services.name: bthserv
services.description: Bluetooth discovery and association. Keep if using Bluetooth.

services.name: camsvc
services.description: Manages UWP app access to camera, microphone, location.

services.name: CertPropSvc
services.description: Copies certificates from smart cards. Not needed without smart cards.

services.name: ClipSVC
services.description: Infrastructure for Microsoft Store. Keep if using Store apps.

services.name: COMSysApp
services.description: Manages COM+ component configuration. Rarely needed.

services.name: CoreMessagingRegistrar
services.description: Manages communication between system components. Essential.

services.name: CryptSvc
services.description: Provides cryptographic services. Required for Windows Update and security.

services.name: DcomLaunch
services.description: Launches COM and DCOM servers. Core Windows component.

services.name: defragsvc
services.description: Defragments and optimizes drives. Can be run manually when needed.

services.name: DeviceAssociationService
services.description: Enables pairing between the system and devices.

services.name: DevQueryBroker
services.description: Enables apps to discover devices with a backgroud task.

services.name: Dhcp
services.description: Registers and updates IP addresses. Required for network connectivity.

services.name: DiagTrack
services.description: Windows telemetry/data collection. Safe to disable for privacy.

services.name: DialogBlockingService
services.description: Blocks dialogs from displaying for non-interactive sessions.

services.name: DispBrokerDesktopSvc
services.description: Manages connection and configuration of displays.

services.name: DisplayEnhancementService
services.description: Manages display enhancement like brightness control.

services.name: DmEnrollmentSvc
services.description: Device enrollment for enterprise management. Not needed for personal use.

services.name: dmwappushservice
services.description: WAP Push message routing. Used for telemetry. Safe to disable.

services.name: Dnscache
services.description: Caches DNS queries. Required for internet connectivity.

services.name: DoSvc
services.description: P2P content delivery for Windows Update. Can use bandwidth.

services.name: DPS
services.description: Enables problem detection and troubleshooting for Windows.

services.name: DsSvc
services.description: Data brokering between applications. Used for telemetry.

services.name: DusmSvc
services.description: Tracks network data usage. Not essential.

services.name: Eaphost
services.description: EAP authentication. Keep if connecting to enterprise Wi-Fi.

services.name: EFS
services.description: File encryption on NTFS volumes. Keep if using file encryption.

services.name: EventLog
services.description: Manages events and event logs. Essential for system monitoring.

services.name: EventSystem
services.description: Supports COM+ events. Required by many Windows components.

services.name: Fax
services.description: Fax sending/receiving. Almost nobody uses fax anymore.

services.name: fdPHost
services.description: Hosts function discovery providers. Used for network discovery.

services.name: FDResPub
services.description: Publishes computer and its resources on the network.

services.name: FontCache
services.description: Optimizes font rendering. Improves app startup times.

services.name: gpsvc
services.description: Applies Group Policy settings. Essential for Windows policy.

services.name: hidserv
services.description: Enables hot buttons on keyboards, remotes. Required for HID devices.

services.name: icssvc
services.description: Mobile hotspot sharing. Only needed when sharing internet.

services.name: InstallService
services.description: Infrastructure support for Microsoft Store.

services.name: iphlpsvc
services.description: IPv6 transition technologies. Keep for IPv6 connectivity.

services.name: KeyIso
services.description: Cryptographic key isolation. Required for security operations.

services.name: LanmanServer
services.description: File and print sharing. Keep if sharing files on network.

services.name: LanmanWorkstation
services.description: Creates and maintains network connections. Required for networking.

services.name: lfsvc
services.description: Monitors device location. Disabling improves privacy.

services.name: LicenseManager
services.description: Infrastructure for Microsoft Store licensing.

services.name: lmhosts
services.description: NetBIOS name resolution. Legacy but sometimes needed.

services.name: LSM
services.description: Manages local user sessions. Essential.

services.name: MapsBroker
services.description: Windows Maps application service. Safe to disable.

services.name: mpssvc
services.description: Windows Firewall. Essential for network security.

services.name: MSDTC
services.description: Coordinates distributed transactions. Only needed for enterprise apps.

services.name: NcbService
services.description: Brokers connections for Microsoft Store apps.

services.name: Netlogon
services.description: Domain authentication. Only needed on domain-joined PCs.

services.name: netprofm
services.description: Identifies connected networks. Required for network awareness.

services.name: NlaSvc
services.description: Collects network configuration info. Required for connectivity.

services.name: nsi
services.description: Delivers network notifications. Required by many network components.

services.name: OneSyncSvc
services.description: Synchronizes mail, contacts, calendar. Disable if not using Windows apps.

services.name: PcaSvc
services.description: Monitors programs for compatibility problems. Rarely useful.

services.name: PhoneSvc
services.description: Manages telephony state on the device. Not needed on desktops.

services.name: PlugPlay
services.description: Enables hardware detection and configuration. Essential.

services.name: Power
services.description: Manages power policy and notifications. Essential.

services.name: PrintNotify
services.description: Printer notifications. Only needed with a printer connected.

services.name: ProfSvc
services.description: Loads and unloads user profiles. Essential.

services.name: QWAVE
services.description: QoS for A/V streaming. Rarely needed.

services.name: RasAuto
services.description: Creates connections to remote networks. Rarely needed.

services.name: RasMan
services.description: Manages VPN and dial-up connections. Keep if using VPN.

services.name: RemoteAccess
services.description: Routing services. Not needed for typical desktop use.

services.name: RemoteRegistry
services.description: Allows remote users to modify registry. Security risk if enabled.

services.name: RmSvc
services.description: Manages radio states (airplane mode). Can disable on desktops.

services.name: RpcEptMapper
services.description: Resolves RPC interface identifiers. Core Windows component.

services.name: RpcSs
services.description: The RPC subsystem. The most critical Windows service.

services.name: SamSs
services.description: Manages security accounts. Essential.

services.name: Schedule
services.description: Enables scheduled tasks. Many Windows features depend on this.

services.name: SDRSVC
services.description: Windows Backup. Disable if using 3rd-party backup.

services.name: SecurityHealthService
services.description: Windows Security health monitoring.

services.name: SENS
services.description: Monitors system events (logon, network, power). Essential.

services.name: SessionEnv
services.description: Remote Desktop session configuration. Disable if not using RDP.

services.name: SharedAccess
services.description: NAT and internet sharing. Not needed unless sharing internet.

services.name: ShellHWDetection
services.description: Provides notifications for AutoPlay hardware events.

services.name: Spooler
services.description: Manages print queues. Safe to disable if no printer connected.

services.name: SSDPSRV
services.description: Discovers UPnP devices on the network. Rarely needed.

services.name: SstpSvc
services.description: SSTP VPN tunneling. Keep if using VPN.

services.name: StateRepository
services.description: Infrastructure for application model. Essential for UWP apps.

services.name: stisvc
services.description: Image acquisition for scanners and cameras. Only if using scanners.

services.name: StorSvc
services.description: Storage settings and external storage expansion.

services.name: SysMain
services.description: Prefetches apps into RAM. Can cause high disk usage. Safe to disable on SSDs.

services.name: SystemEventsBroker
services.description: Coordinates system event execution. Essential.

services.name: TabletInputService
services.description: Touch keyboard and handwriting. Not needed on non-touch devices.

services.name: TermService
services.description: Remote Desktop connections. Disable if not using RDP.

services.name: Themes
services.description: User experience theme management. Keeps Windows looking nice.

services.name: TrkWks
services.description: Maintains NTFS file links across network. Enterprise feature.

services.name: TrustedInstaller
services.description: Installs, modifies, and removes Windows updates/components.

services.name: UmRdpService
services.description: RDP device redirection. Not needed without Remote Desktop.

services.name: upnphost
services.description: Hosts UPnP devices on this computer. Rarely needed.

services.name: UserManager
services.description: Multi-user management. Essential.

services.name: UsoSvc
services.description: Manages Windows Updates. Keep to stay updated.

services.name: VaultSvc
services.description: Provides secure storage of credentials.

services.name: W32Time
services.description: Maintains date and time synchronization.

services.name: WaaSMedicSvc
services.description: Remediates Windows Update components.

services.name: WbioSrvc
services.description: Biometric devices (fingerprint, face). Only if using biometrics.

services.name: Wcmsvc
services.description: Makes network connect/disconnect decisions. Essential.

services.name: WdiServiceHost
services.description: Diagnostic service host. Used for troubleshooting.

services.name: WdiSystemHost
services.description: Diagnostic system host. Used for troubleshooting.

services.name: WerSvc
services.description: Sends error reports to Microsoft. Safe to disable for privacy.

services.name: WinDefend
services.description: Anti-malware protection. Keep enabled unless using alternative AV.

services.name: WinHttpAutoProxySvc
services.description: Auto-detects proxy settings. Keep for network connectivity.

services.name: Winmgmt
services.description: WMI interface. Many tools and scripts depend on this.

services.name: WinRM
services.description: Remote management protocol. Disable if not managing remotely.

services.name: wisvc
services.description: Windows Insider Program. Safe to disable if not an insider.

services.name: WlanSvc
services.description: Wi-Fi connectivity. Essential for wireless network.

services.name: WMPNetworkSvc
services.description: Shares Windows Media Player libraries. Rarely used.

services.name: WpcMonSvc
services.description: Parental controls monitoring. Only needed for family settings.

services.name: WPDBusEnum
services.description: Enforces group policy for removable mass-storage devices.

services.name: WpnService
services.description: Push notifications. Keep for app notifications.

services.name: wscsvc
services.description: Monitors and reports security health settings.

services.name: WSearch
services.description: Content indexing and search. Can use significant resources. Safe to disable.

services.name: wuauserv
services.description: Detects and downloads Windows updates. Important for security.

services.name: WwanSvc
services.description: Mobile broadband management. Only needed with cellular adapter.

services.name: XblAuthManager
services.description: Xbox Live authentication. Safe to disable if not gaming on Xbox.

services.name: XblGameSave
services.description: Xbox Live game save sync. Safe to disable.

services.name: XboxGipSvc
services.description: Xbox accessory management. Only needed for Xbox controllers.

services.name: XboxNetApiSvc
services.description: Xbox Live networking. Safe to disable.

services.name: MSSQLSERVER
services.description: Microsoft SQL Server database engine. Uses 500MB+ RAM even when idle.

services.name: MSSQL$SQLEXPRESS
services.description: SQL Server Express edition. Heavy memory consumer when not in use.

services.name: SQLBrowser
services.description: SQL Server instance discovery. Only needed during active development.

services.name: SQLTELEMETRY
services.description: Sends usage data to Microsoft from SQL Server. Pure telemetry.

services.name: SQLTELEMETRY$SQLEXPRESS
services.description: Telemetry for SQL Server Express. No user benefit.

services.name: SQLWriter
services.description: Provides backup/restore via VSS for SQL Server. Not needed day-to-day.

services.name: MSSQLLaunchpad
services.description: Manages external script execution for SQL Server ML. Rarely needed.

services.name: SSISTELEMETRY150
services.description: SSIS telemetry service. Pure data collection.

services.name: MsDtsServer150
services.description: SQL Server Integration Services engine. Only for ETL pipelines.

services.name: SSASTELEMETRY
services.description: Analysis Services telemetry. Data collection only.

services.name: MSSQLServerOLAPService
services.description: OLAP and data mining. Only for BI/analytics development.

services.name: ReportServer
services.description: SSRS report server. Only for report development.

services.name: SQLAgent$SQLEXPRESS
services.description: SQL job scheduling agent. Not needed outside active DB work.

services.name: AdobeARMservice
services.description: Auto-updates Adobe products. Runs constantly checking for updates.

services.name: AGSService
services.description: Validates Adobe software licenses. Background resource drain.

services.name: AdobeUpdateService
services.description: Adobe Creative Cloud updater. Constant background activity.

services.name: AGMService
services.description: Adobe license monitoring. Unnecessary background process.

services.name: gupdate
services.description: Auto-updates Google software. Runs on schedule consuming resources.

services.name: gupdatem
services.description: On-demand Google updater. Triggered by Chrome/Google apps.

services.name: edgeupdate
services.description: Auto-updates Microsoft Edge. Can run manually when needed.

services.name: edgeupdatem
services.description: On-demand Edge updater.

services.name: MicrosoftEdgeElevationService
services.description: Elevated Edge updates. Not needed running constantly.

services.name: Bonjour Service
services.description: Apple mDNS/DNS-SD responder. Installed with iTunes/iCloud. Unnecessary on most PCs.

services.name: iPod Service
services.description: Legacy iPod syncing. Nobody uses iPods anymore.

services.name: AppleMobileDeviceService
services.description: iPhone/iPad connectivity. Only needed when syncing Apple devices.

services.name: Steam Client Service
services.description: Steam DRM and game management. Only needed when gaming.

services.name: EpicOnlineServices
services.description: Epic Games launcher service. Background resource consumer.

services.name: CorsairService
services.description: Corsair iCUE peripheral management. Uses significant RAM for RGB control.

services.name: RzActionSvc
services.description: Razer peripheral management. Heavy resource usage for mouse/keyboard config.

services.name: Razer Game Manager Service
services.description: Razer game optimization. Unnecessary background service.

services.name: NVDisplay.ContainerLocalSystem
services.description: Core NVIDIA display driver service. Keep if using NVIDIA GPU.

services.name: NvTelemetryContainer
services.description: NVIDIA telemetry data collection. Sends usage data to NVIDIA.

services.name: NvContainerNetworkService
services.description: NVIDIA network telemetry. Not needed for GPU functionality.

services.name: Origin Web Helper Service
services.description: EA Origin/EA App helper. Runs in background for EA game launcher.

services.name: OverwolfUpdater
services.description: Overwolf overlay auto-updater. Constant background process.

services.name: OneSyncSvc_*
services.description: Per-user sync service. Syncs Mail/Calendar/Contacts in background.

services.name: CDPUserSvc
services.description: Cross-device experience sync. Only for 'Continue on PC' features.

services.name: MessagingService
services.description: SMS/MMS messaging relay. Not needed on desktops.

services.name: RetailDemo
services.description: Store display demo mode. Absolutely no use on personal PCs.

services.name: WMPNetworkSvc
services.description: Shares WMP libraries over network. Legacy media feature.

services.name: HPAppHelperCap
services.description: HP manufacturer bloatware. No essential functionality.

services.name: HPDiagsCap
services.description: HP hardware diagnostics. Can run manually if needed.

services.name: HPNetworkCap
services.description: HP network helper. Unnecessary OEM service.

services.name: HPSysInfoCap
services.description: HP system information collector. OEM telemetry.

services.name: LenovoVantageService
services.description: Lenovo system management. Heavy OEM bloatware.

services.name: DellClientManagementService
services.description: Dell management and telemetry. OEM resource drain.

services.name: SupportAssistAgent
services.description: Dell support diagnostics. Constantly running in background.
